race.comment: TOUR DE MOON (3) was a flashing light on debut, only missing by a head at Balaklava. Is sure to have come on from that and gets a key jockey switch in Toeroek. Can go one better. NOW EAST (2) resumes. Showed plenty of promise in his second prep without breaking through. Trialled well in readiness, though will need a smart steer from the car park draw. HERE SHE IS (13) is a Puissance De Lune filly on debut for the smart juvenile stable of Michael Hickmott. Built nicely in her lead-up work, forgiving the latest, and gets a key booking in Crowther. Can make a bright start. WOODSTOCK (6) improved nicely second-up when chasing gamely into the placings at Balaklava. Fitter again, though will need some luck from the wide draw.
